author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Decision: fix reshape forward to use view_operation (zero-copy shared storage + grad_fn) for both CPU and GPU, matching the pattern already used by flatten/squeeze/unsqueeze. Also fix all 4 shape backward functions (ReshapeBackward, FlattenBackward, SqueezeBackward, UnsqueezeBackward) to use view_reshape instead of ensure_cpu/restore_device — these are all pure shape metadata changes that don't need GPU→CPU→GPU roundtrips.
